    C

    CardFactory - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared
    Factory for the dashboard stat cards row.
    CardFactory() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared.CardFactory
     
    ChartData - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto
    Data transfer object carrying the three monthly listening time series (current year, previous year, all-time highest year) needed to render the dashboard line chart and its colour-coded title row.
    ChartData(Map, Map, Map, Integer, Integer, Integer, List, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.ChartData
    Data transfer object carrying all series data and metadata required to render the dashboard line chart.
    ChartViewModel - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph
    Loads and prepares the data series for the dashboard line chart.
    ChartViewModel() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph.ChartViewModel
     
    clearSelection() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.controller.PlaylistController
    Clears selection; returns to the full playlist browser.
